posts.text: Aaawwwwwwww! Hell Yeah Bednar! @tatis_jr……gone with the Strikeout. Next…..Marte out on a 78-mph curveball. That’s what the hell I’m talking about!!!
Whoa! @bryceharper3’s bat speed didn’t look slow on that double, though :-). USA gotta score here though. Severino is pitching his ass off for the DR!

Damn! You’re @Paul_Skenes — the best in the business — you can’t leave that pitch over the plate for Caminero. Not that man. The Dominicans draw first blood, up 1-0 on Team USA. Okay! Okay! Let’s Go USA!

Acuff is so damn special. He’s up there for sure. Reminds me of Iverson. Whatever it takes, he can do it to get the job done. But here’s the real deal: @RazorbackMBB is LOADED. Brazil. Wagner off the bench. Richmond III. Team to watch in the Tourney.


Arkansas Razorbacks Men’s Basketball 🐗 (@RazorbackMBB)

Best player in the country. No Debate. Darius Acuff Jr. just proved it again. #AcuffPOY



Video
  





— https://nitter.net/RazorbackMBB/status/2032678978108977306#m

Our Gov’t. Good Lord! According to someone on CNN, the White House said 100K DHS workers missed a paycheck this week, 300 TSA workers have already quit their jobs, folks are calling out sick because they need to go work another job at the double the rate — yet Trump is saying the pressure is on the Dems! Really? What a disgrace. I’m going back to watching some basketball and the World Baseball Classic tonight. This stuff is just hard to take! Oh, and the OSCARS tonight
The one and only is in the house! piped.video/zIrv4xCOdo4?si=T87Q…

What are you doing?

Video
☎️ Called Fareed Zakaria to break down the escalating tensions between Israel, Iran, and the United States. piped.video/_AWQphKz2kg?si=Up1t…
Do you think America is broken? piped.video/R3MYaEOiuuQ?si=nHcc…

We are now in Hour 2 of the show! If you’ve been listening and saying
"Man, I wish I could respond to that take…"

The big political risk is…
I am so thankful for the inaugural BFOA Broadcast Personality of the Year Award and Judge Judy was in the house! My mission is to impact others and I won't stop.
On Monday, March 9, I received the Broadcast Personality of the Year Award. I made sure my family and team were by my side to celebrate such a special moment.
I can’t believe this!!
Is it America First?  My political take is on YouTube right now. Join the conversation, I want to know what you think.
